ingredients_text:
noodle mix 96% [dried noodles 64% ( wheat  flour, palm oil, salt, firming agents (potassium carbonate, sodium carbonates)), maltodextrin,  wheat  flour, sugar, glucose syrup, carrots, peas 1%, acidity regulator (sodium acetates), onion powder, palm fat, flavour enhancer (monosodium glutamate), curry powder (cumin, coriander, turmeric, fenugreek seed, bay leaves, cloves, black pepper, cinnamon, chilli, fennel seed), flavourings, salt, yeast extract, potato starch, potassium chloride, garlic powder, cheese powder ( milk )],
